name: edtech-partner-success
description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane (partner-success-manager, success-playbook-designer, qbr-composer, learning-analytics-analyst, ferpa-comms-translator, partner-profile-curator) with 4 skills, 9 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 10-doc knowledge bank: 3 production-lesson files (v0.2.0), 4 foundational files (v0.3.0), 2 vertical-depth files (v0.4.0 — AI in EdTech + renewal pricing), and 1 operating-cadence file (v0.4.1 — time-zone discipline + K-12 calendar dead-zone signal-suppression + signals-by-rhythm). v0.4.1 also adds the cross-functional-partnership-map template (PSM's per-vendor map of which internal function owns what + hand-back criteria + escalation paths). Compact inline priors on the 6 affected agents and primary-source citations with retrieval dates. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols including the alternate-methods Capability Grounding Protocol.
